name: Claude Code Auto-Fix & Commit
description: Higher-trust: let Claude Code edit a repo and commit on a schedule. Still fenced by `--permission-mode dontAsk` — only the edit/git tools you list are pre-approved. Scope `--allowedTools` narrowly and review the log/commits.

parameters.label: Repository path
parameters.help: Absolute path to the local git repository.

parameters.label: Prompt
parameters.help: The task Claude performs, e.g. "Fix lint errors and commit". Avoid single quotes.

parameters.label: Allowed tools
parameters.help: Edit + scoped git tools pre-approved for the run. Keep Bash scoped (e.g. Bash(git commit *)), never a bare Bash. dontAsk auto-denies anything not listed.

parameters.label: Max turns
parameters.help: Abort the run after this many agentic turns.

parameters.label: Log file path
parameters.help: Where the run output is captured for review.
